'''Dagro''' was a remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and a noted [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Description==
Dagro was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] mostly encompassed by plains that were set aside for the growing of various [[Grain/Legends|grains]], including [[sargheet]]. However, several deep rift canyons split the surface in many areas.

==History==
Two years into the Clone Wars, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] discovered a secret [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base on the planet. With the help of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], he was able to infiltrate the base and discover the development of [[crawl-carrier]]s. They were able to destroy the base, however a crawl-carrier managed to escape. Although it was soon located and destroyed by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] thanks to the help of the local farmers, before it could do any harm to the village.

{{Planet-stub}}
